setup.tryIt: After the QR login finishes, send a WeChat DM to the connected account.
setup.summary: WeChat signs in with a QR code and saves the account state locally.
steps: Click Connect and scan the QR code with WeChat on your phone.
Keep the local gateway running while WeChat receives messages.
Send a direct test message to confirm the account is connected.

custom.scanDescription: Use WeChat on your phone to scan this code. nanobot saves the account state locally after login.
